observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with foreign material
Visual pattern suggesting metallic particle embedded
Localized deviation from normal carpet appearance
mechanism_explanation: Contamination from external particles introduced during manufacturing or handling.
severity_visual_description: moderate metallic particle embedded visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Increase cleanroom filtration and add pre-process cleaning step.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the metallic particle embedded would be absent and surface appears normal.
